expectations.evidence: Response shows 'php tool/build-update.php --staged-only' in both the analysis section and the proposed command

expectations.text: Không được bỏ qua flag --staged-only — phải có trong lệnh thực thi
expectations.evidence: Flag --staged-only is present in the command: 'php tool/build-update.php --staged-only'. Also correctly detects that no files are staged and warns the user.
